CVE-2024-8376.title: In Eclipse Mosquitto up to version 2.0.18a, an attacker can achie ...
CVE-2024-8376.summary: In Eclipse Mosquitto up to version 2.0.18a, an attacker can achieve memory leaking, segmentation fault or heap-use-after-free by sending specific sequences of "CONNECT", "DISCONNECT", "SUBSCRIBE", "UNSUBSCRIBE" and "PUBLISH" packets.
